description: Lien Clearance — tracks existing liens on the property, coordinates payoff demands, monitors release recordings, and blocks DTC transfer and closing until all liens are satisfied and released.

hard_stops.label: Unreleased Lien Block DTC Transfer
hard_stops.logic: An existing lien has not been released — block DTC transfer until lien release is recorded.

hard_stops.label: Payoff Amount Unconfirmed Block Disbursement
hard_stops.logic: Payoff amount from lienholder has not been confirmed — block disbursement until confirmed payoff demand is received.

hard_stops.label: Release Not Recorded Block Closing
hard_stops.logic: Lien release has not been recorded with the county — block closing until recording is confirmed.

soft_flags.label: Payoff Amount Increase
soft_flags.logic: Payoff amount has increased since the original demand — flag for review and updated HUD/CD.

soft_flags.label: Per Diem High
soft_flags.logic: Per diem interest on the existing lien is unusually high — flag for timing optimization.

soft_flags.label: Multiple Liens
soft_flags.logic: Property has multiple liens requiring coordination — flag for sequencing and priority review.
